news.title: Iran says it will 'never bow' as Trump rejects peace counteroffer, prolonging Middle East conflict
news.summary: Washington has sought to press Beijing to lean on Tehran to reopen the strait. China's appetite to act as a pressure mechanism remains unclear.

news.title: Michael Burry is not a believer: 'For any stocks going parabolic reduce positions almost entirely'

news.title: JPMorgan Chase-led bank group reins in credit line to troubled KKR private credit fund as losses mount
news.summary: The KKR fund, often referred to by its ticker, FSK, has become one of the most visible fault lines in the private credit story.

news.title: April home sales disappoint as higher mortgage rates weigh on buyers
news.summary: Home sales barely moved in April, as mortgage rates shot higher the month before. Uncertainty over the war with Iran weighed on consumers.

news.title: Hassett says AI isn't costing anybody their job right now — but tech layoffs keep coming
news.summary: Tech companies have continued to announce layoffs tied to AI, including recent cuts from Amazon, Meta and Oracle. Tech companies have continue to announceLayoffs tied toAI.

news.title: AI is ‘absolutely useless’ at forecasting inflation. This proven model is 12 times more accurate.
news.summary: A ‘low-tech’ tool from the Cleveland Fed consistently outperforms generative AI. Generative AI has struggled to provide reliable forecasts.

news.title: Intel’s stock extends its hot streak. This is the latest source of optimism.
news.summary: The company is reportedly working with South Korea’s SK Hynix on new chip-packaging technology. The technology could be used in the next generation of iPhones and iPads.

news.title: Lumentum builds on its scorching stock rally after earning a spot in this hot index
news.summary: Lumentum's stock performance ranks fifth in the S&P 500 this year. Now the optical company is set to join the Nasdaq-100.
